rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow admins to update medicine details.
The system shall allow admins to manage customer orders.
The system shall allow admins to view delivery addresses related to customer orders.
The system shall allow admins to update attendance records.
The system shall allow admins to update salary details.

source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: An admin begins by updating medicine details.
After that, they manage customer orders.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Admins can view delivery addresses related to customer orders.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They can then view delivery addresses related to those orders.
Finally, they update salary details, and it ends.
